SRI. BHUSHAN-NEW DELIIT (NORTH INDIA)
YOUR BOOK "TRANSIT ... -" make a very interesting
reading. Thanks for your great efforts.
MR. PASCAL MORISET-PARIS-FRANCE
I read passionately your 2 books BHRIGU NANDI NADI &
YOUR FORTUNE FROM THE HOUSE (V ASTU
SHASTRA) -God revealed to India the holy mysteries of the
astrology. The West, the one ofhumbles (not the one of
spiritually blind rationalist and rich). who knows that the light hail
from the mystical East set one's hopes on his astrologers, sages,
seers, sadhus, yogis and yoginis and your humble servant too.
Yr u consecrated all your life to decipher the immortal message
of the reverend Rishis blessed by God So, may Godhead bless
your and yours, bless your work and the readers.
PlEASE NOTE
1. SOME BOOKS ARE PUBLISHED FROM OUR
OFFICE AND SOME THROUGHT PUBLISHERS
AND PRICES SUBJCT TOVA RIATIONS FOR
AV AIUNG BOOKS THROUGH SUCH SOURSES
FROM TIME TO TIME TO MEET POSTAGES &
CONTINGENCIES ETC.
